subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath caused the oceans of joy to surge with the breezes of blissful love on this celebrated day through the union of one of His handmaids
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی موج بحور السرور بأرياح الحب والحبور في هذا اليوم المشکور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God
